episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 376: Preparing for Eldraine & Ixalan
episode.description: James and Cliff walk you through all the latest MTGFinance news including the weekly Meta Analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and talk over what to expect from returns to Eldraine and Ixalan this fall.
